key_claims.election: Jen Jordan challenged incumbent Justice Sarah Hawkins Warren in the May 19, 2026 Georgia Supreme Court election.
key_claims.jqc_findings: Public reporting describes non-final JQC concerns involving campaign conduct.
key_claims.sealed_litigation: Secondary reporting describes litigation involving the JQC, but no primary docket is anchored here.
